summary: Completed frontend-only Playwright testing of SUNDOOK single-page landing site at the production preview URL. Verified all 10 listed feature checks: hero headline+CTA, header sticky nav with 5 anchor links, mobile menu toggle open/close (390x844), three product cards with WhatsApp quote buttons, 6 customisation/craft feature cards, gallery carousel with prev/next + 3 dot navigation, 5 process steps (01-05), final CTA with WhatsApp/email/phone/instagram contact cards holding the placeholder values, no console errors, and proper rendering at desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. All CTAs verified to point to wa.me/919876543210 with target=_blank without following the external link. Page is fully static; no backend involved.

issues: Hero subhead text overflows behind the right-edge background image fade — words like 'holding', 'memory', and 'wedding trunk' are cut off on the right at 390px width. Consider tightening max-width or strengthening the ivory wash gradient on small screens.

action_items: Optional: Fix mobile hero subhead right-edge clipping at 390px width — text intersects with the warm ivory wash and is partially obscured by the background image.
critical_code_review_comments: Products.jsx and Gallery.jsx use dangerouslySetInnerHTML with hard-coded entity strings (’, “). Since all content is author-controlled this is safe today, but switching to plain JSX text with proper unicode characters would remove an unnecessary XSS surface and simplify future i18n.

whatsapp.js stores WA_PHONE/EMAIL/INSTAGRAM as hardcoded constants — acceptable for an MVP placeholder, but a small CONTACT config object (or env-driven values) would let the owner replace placeholders without touching code.
Hero background image loads via inline background-image style (not ), so it has no loading=lazy/decoding hints and no alt. Consider a preloaded with proper attributes for LCP and a11y.

All sections live under one top-level Landing.jsx with no React.lazy / code splitting. Bundle size is fine today, but the carousel + lucide-react icons add weight that could be deferred below the fold.
seed_data_creation: None — fully static site, no DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 functional checks from the review request pass at the public preview URL. Only finding is a minor visual issue: at 390x844 the hero subhead text bleeds into the background image on the right edge. Use data-testid selectors (header-enquire-cta, hero-preorder-cta, nav-{slug}, product-card-{id}, product-quote-btn-{id}, gallery-prev/next, gallery-dot-0..2, process-step-01..05, final-whatsapp-cta, final-email-cta, contact-phone/email/instagram, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu). WA placeholder phone is 919876543210; all CTAs verified to open in new tab — do NOT actually follow wa.me links in playwright (just assert href).
